title: Soochipara Falls
tagline: Soochipara Falls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Soochipara Falls also known as Sentinel Rock Waterfalls is a three-tiered waterfall in Vellarimala, Wayanad, India.
overview.description: Soochipara Falls also known as Sentinel Rock Waterfalls is a three-tiered waterfall in Vellarimala, Wayanad, India. It is surrounded by deciduous, evergreen and montane forests. Locally referred to as Soochipara ("Soochi" meaning "Needle" and "Para" meaning "Rock"), the 15-20 minute drive from Meppadi to Sentinel Rock Waterfalls has views of a number of Wayanad's tea estates. The Sentinel Rock Waterfalls is 200 metres (656 feet) and offers a cliff face that is used for rock climbing.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chooralmala
topPlaces.description: Chooralmala is a village located in the Meppadi panchayat in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanthanpara Waterfalls
topPlaces.description: Kanthapara Falls is a waterfall in Wayanad district of Kerala, India. It is located 8 km east of Meppadi and has a total height of around 30 meters.

topPlaces.name: Mundakkai, Wayanad
topPlaces.description: Mundakkai is a ghost town in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India. It was destroyed on July 30th 2024, due to the 2024 Wayanad Landslides.

topPlaces.name: Meppadi
topPlaces.description: Meppadi is a small town in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a scenic hill station on the State Highway between Kozhikode and Ooty.

topPlaces.name: Vellarimala
topPlaces.description: Vellarimala Hills is a mountain range in Kerala, India, spread across Thiruvambady Panchayat in Kozhikode district and Meppadi Panchayat in Wayanad district.

topPlaces.name: Chembra Peak
topPlaces.description: Chembra Peak (Chembra Mala) is a mountain in the state of Kerala, India, with an elevation of 2,100 m (6,890 ft) above sea level. The highest peak in the Wayanad hills and one of the highest peaks in the Western Ghats, adjoining the Nilgiri Hills and Vellarimala, it is located in the Wayanad district and Malappuram district in Kerala, near Kalpetta town and Nilambur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Vaduvanchal
topPlaces.description: Vaduvanchal is a small town in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated in the Kozhikode-Ooty road.

topPlaces.name: Vavul Mala
topPlaces.description: Vavul Mala is a peak in the Western Ghats in the Vellarimala range of Kerala, India. It is situated at the trijunction of the districts of Malappuram, Kozhikode and Wayanad in Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Soochipara Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Soochipara Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Soochipara Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Soochipara Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Soochipara Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Soochipara Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Soochipara Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Soochipara Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chooralmala, Kanthanpara Waterfalls, Mundakkai, Wayanad, Meppadi, Vellarimala.
